---
title: "Reported road casualties: cyclist factsheet"
author: "Blaise Kelly"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, message=FALSE}

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
devtools::load_all("../../stats19_match/")
library(reshape2)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)

la_name = "Bristol"

la_dir = paste0("../outputs/", la_name)

load(paste0(la_dir,"/data/LA_report_dat.Rdata"))

la_dir_rend = paste("outputs/",la_name,"/")

plot_path = paste0(la_dir_rend, "plots/lsoa_all.png")


```

# Introduction
This is a report for the Local Authority (LA) region of `r la_name`, which can be reproduced for any LA by cloning the repository at https://github.com/blaisekelly/stats19_stats.

![](outputs/Bristol/plots/lsoa/lsoa_all.png)

The LA boundary is shown on this plot of the cycle network (from OSM data processed with the osmactive package).
```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::include_graphics(paste0(la_dir_rend, "/plots/lsoa/lsoa_all.png"))
```
